nodes.name: When Executed by WF-001
nodes.notes: Accept all data (passthrough). inputSource MUST be lowercase 'passthrough'; n8n silently ignores camelCase 'passThrough' on import and falls back to defined-fields mode, dropping the caller's payload (and any binary).

nodes.name: Execute Transaction
nodes.notes: Runs BEGIN..COMMIT as ONE query (§234). On error the txn rolls back and the node fails -> WF-001 IF routes to Repository/FAILED. CRIE Postgres credential.

meta.note: Single Postgres transaction (§234). Parameterize before production.
meta.enrichment: output = {...incomingItem, newResult}; never discards accumulated state
meta.jsonbFix: settings is jsonb (object); removed JSON.parse on settings; LLM-content parse retained
meta.triggerFix: executeWorkflowTrigger upgraded to 1.1 inputSource=passThrough for binary passthrough
changelog: FIX: executeWorkflowTrigger inputSource was camelCase 'passThrough', which n8n silently ignores on import — the trigger fell back to defined-fields mode and dropped the caller's payload. Corrected to lowercase 'passthrough' (Accept all data).
